title: Vanilla optimize ++
description: this a very well optimize pack with a lot of pvp optimization as well this will improve your game play buy 90%
body:
This is a simply optimize modpack this were created for those dont get much fps and this include pvp helpfull mods this modpack will not ruined the vanilla gameplay this modpack also works with servers so no need to worry about crashing the game or get big lagspikes when playing
